text: Welcome to SOST Talk. This is a moderated community space. The bot protects against spam, scams and noise — not criticism. Be respectful, report issues, and help make the protocol stronger.

OTC / P2P Board is now open. Hard rules: SOST Protocol does not intermediate, custody, or escrow any trade posted here. Admins never DM first. Use small test transactions. Anyone claiming to be "official escrow" or a "guaranteed buyer/seller" is a scam. Trade at your own risk. See the OTC rules in the community rules doc.

OTC Reputation room is now open. Hard rules: SOST Protocol does NOT verify or endorse any reputation claim posted here. This is community-curated, unverified. Fake reputation is itself a scam pattern (Sybil attack — one scammer posting fake positive reviews about themselves under multiple identities). Cross-check every thread. Suggested format: [REP+ or REP-] counterparty handle, trade size, payment method, date, outcome, evidence (txid / explorer link). No doxxing. Sentinel scam patterns apply here identically. See OTC Reputation Room Rules in the community rules doc.
